code_analysis.description: Pseudocode pattern analysis: linked list operations, vtable calls, virtual destructor patterns, effect spawning with type IDs

EffectGroup (unknown class).description: 27 functions in 0x8056731c-0x805685b4 range operate on a global linked-list collection. Pattern: template-based effect spawning with type IDs 0-6, list CRUD operations, and 4 identical virtual destructors. Likely a physics particle/effect manager but class name unconfirmed.

key_discoveries: 23 of 50 functions (46%) have exact PAL address matches in mkw-structures player.h, providing certain names
The 27 functions at 0x8056731c-0x805685b4 form a cohesive group managing a global linked-list collection, likely a physics particle/effect system
7 effect spawner variants (0x805680ac-0x805685b4) call a shared template creator (0x805679d0) with different type IDs (0, 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, or param)
4 identical virtual destructors (0x80567fac, 0x80567fec, 0x8056802c, 0x8056806c) belong to unknown small classes within the effect system
The effect spawners save/restore position data at object offsets 0x18/0x1c and load target position from 0x100/0x104
PlayerSub10::update (0x805788dc) is the largest function at 4304 bytes with 1076 instructions, serving as the main physics update loop

address_range_coverage.0x80577fc4-0x805784d4: PlayerSub10 ctor + PlayerBoost dtor + setTurnParams + init (4 functions, certain)
address_range_coverage.0x805788dc-0x8057c3d4: PlayerSub10 update + core physics (6 functions, certain)
